sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50630" key="i)ofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰο-φόρος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, </foreign>(<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἰός</foreign> B, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φέρω</foreign>) <sense id="n50630.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">poison-bearing</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:433" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.433</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
